---
title: "Abhijit Chowdhary"
subtitle: "Postdoctoral Researcher at [Tufts University](https://math.tufts.edu/)"
image: assets/img/prof_pic.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:abhijit.chowdhary@tufts.edu
    - text: Google Scholar
      icon: mortarboard
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=8Wg1zW4AAAAJ
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/abhijit-c
listing:
  - id: recent-news
    contents: news
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 5
    type: table
    fields: [date, description]
    date-format: "MMM YYYY"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
---

I am a computational mathematician and my research interests lie in wielding
math to design and analyze computational algorithms.
Currently, I'm working on algorithms in uncertainty quantification, machine learning, and optimization.
I've also been known to write a theorem or two.

Outside of math, I enjoy Dungeons \& Dragons / Pathfinder with friends across
the continent, playing fighting games, and am very into computers.

---

## Recent News

::: {#recent-news}
:::

---

## Selected Papers

**[Boost Like a (Var)Pro: Trust-Region Gradient Boosting via Variable Projection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23658)**
Chowdhary, Newman, Verma · *arXiv 2603.23658* · 2026

**[Robust Optimal Experimental Design of Infinite-Dimensional Bayesian Nonlinear Inverse Problems](https://doi.org/10.1137/24M1693921)**
Chowdhary, Attia, Alexanderian · *SIAM Journal on Scientific Computing* · 2026

**[Sensitivity Analysis of the Information Gain in Infinite-Dimensional Bayesian Linear Inverse Problems](https://doi.org/10.1615/Int.J.UncertaintyQuantification.2024051416)**
Chowdhary, Tong, Stadler, Alexanderian · *International Journal for Uncertainty Quantification* · 2024
